prompt_text: Gainsight vs Totango pricing and features
response:
# Gainsight vs Totango: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing Overview**

| Aspect | Gainsight | Totango |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| **Model** | Custom pricing | Tiered + custom |
| **Starting Price** | ~$50K-100K+/year | ~$30K-80K+/year |
| **Best For** | Enterprise | Mid-market to Enterprise |

*Note: Both require custom quotes; pricing varies significantly based on usage and features*

---

## **Core Features Comparison**

### **Gainsight**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Robust customer data platform
- Advanced AI-driven health scoring
- Strong lifecycle automation
- Executive dashboards (C-suite focused)
- Deep Salesforce integration
- Excellent onboarding workflows
- Multi-tenant architecture

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Steeper learning curve
- Higher implementation costs
- Can feel feature-heavy for smaller teams
- Slower UI in some modules

### **Totango**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Intuitive, user-friendly interface
- Faster deployment time
- Strong usage analytics
- Flexible segmentation
- Better mobile experience
- More affordable entry point
- Good API/integrations

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Less mature AI capabilities
- Smaller feature ecosystem
- Limited multi-tenant support
- Weaker executive reporting (historically)

---

## **Feature Deep Dive**

| Feature | Gainsight | Totango |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| **Health Scoring** | Advanced AI-driven | Rules-based + basic AI |
| **Usage Analytics** | Good | Excellent |
| **Workflow Automation** | Comprehensive | Solid |
| **Integrations** | 150+ | 100+ |
| **Custom Fields** | Extensive | Good |
| **Mobile App** | Limited | Strong |
| **Reporting** | Executive-focused | Operational |
| **API Quality** | Mature | Good |

---

## **Implementation & Support**

| Factor | Gainsight | Totango |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| **Setup Time** | 3-6 months | 4-12 weeks |
| **Training Resources** | Excellent | Very good |
| **Professional Services** | Required ($$) | Optional |
| **Community** | Active | Growing |

---

## **Who Should Choose Each?**

### **Choose Gainsight if you:**
- Are enterprise-level ($10M+ ARR)
- Need advanced predictive analytics
- Require deep Salesforce integration
- Want executive/board-ready dashboards
- Can invest in implementation

### **Choose Totango if you:**
- Are mid-market ($1M-50M ARR)
- Prioritize quick time-to-value
- Need strong usage analytics
- Prefer ease-of-use
- Have budget constraints
- Want modern, intuitive UI

---

## **Emerging Considerations (2024)**

- **Gainsight**: Recently acquired by Salesforce (2023) — expect deeper Salesforce integration
- **Totango**: Focusing on AI enhancements; improving executive dashboards
- Both adding more AI-powered insights

---

## **Bottom Line**

- **Gainsight** = Power & customization (enterprise tax)
- **Totango** = Simplicity & quick wins (smart mid-market choice)

**Request demos from both** — the right choice depends heavily on your team's technical capacity and specific workflows.
